Documentation for this format

name: EHDSMedicationDispenseObligations
title: Medication dispense model obligations
description: Obligations for the logical model for medication dispense for dispensing/pharmacy systems (producer) and prescribing systems or prescription repositories(consumer).

element.definition: Logical model for medication dispensation (based on a request and dispensed in a pharmacy). Implementers should take into account, if allowed and needed, the calculation of remaining dispensable product based on this information.

element.short: The person for whom the medication is prescribed. [Used for searching]
element.definition: The person for whom the medication is prescribed. [Used for searching]

element.short: Business identifier(s) for the dispense record. [Used for searching]
element.definition: Business identifier(s) for the dispense record. [Used for searching]

extension.valueMarkdown: Systems shall support at least EHDSHealthProfessional data type for the element.

element.short: The actor who issued the dispense record. Responsibility for the dispense should be traceable from this information.
element.definition: The actor who issued the dispense record. Responsibility for the dispense should be traceable from this information.

element.short: Date and time of issuing the dispense record. [Used for searching]
element.definition: Date and time of issuing the dispense record. [Used for searching]

element.short: The status of the dispense, e.g. completed, declined, entered-in-error. [Used for searching]
element.definition: The status of the dispense, e.g. completed, declined, entered-in-error. [Used for searching]

element.short: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.
element.definition: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

element.short: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.
element.definition: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

element.short: Identification of the person who received the dispensed medication, especially when it was not the patient. When not present, it is assumed that the patient is the receiver.
element.definition: Identification of the person who received the dispensed medication, especially when it was not the patient. When not present, it is assumed that the patient is the receiver.

element.short: Identifier of the prescription item the dispense is related to.  [Used for searching]
element.definition: Identifier of the prescription item the dispense is related to.  [Used for searching]

element.short: Exact dispensed product. If multiple medications are dispensed together, multiple dispense records should be created.
element.definition: Exact dispensed product. If multiple medications are dispensed together, multiple dispense records should be created.

element.short: Number of dispensed packages if the package size is known, or number of smaller items/units, according to the medication dispensed. A unit is expected.
element.definition: Number of dispensed packages if the package size is known, or number of smaller items/units, according to the medication dispensed. A unit is expected.

element.short: Date and time when medication was handed over. When not present, the time of dispensation is assumed to be the time of issuing dispense record.
element.definition: Date and time when medication was handed over. When not present, the time of dispensation is assumed to be the time of issuing dispense record.

element.short: Whether substitution was made by the dispenser. Definition of substitution is specific to the jurisdiction.
element.definition: Whether substitution was made by the dispenser. Definition of substitution is specific to the jurisdiction.

extension.valueMarkdown: Systems shall support at least EHDSHealthProfessional data type for the element.
